demographics.living_situation: lives at home with his parents

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: (Parents calling on behalf of their 16-year-old son) He hasn't slept in two days, he is completely erratic, and his hands are shaking uncontrollably.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: He has become impossible to manage over the last two days and now his hands won't stop shaking — we don't know what to do.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 48 hours ago, and it has been getting steadily worse
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly two days of extreme behaviour; the hand shaking started in the last 12 hours or so
symptom_narrative.character: he's been hyperactive, extremely irritable and impossible to settle, hasn't slept at all, and now both hands are shaking continuously
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst we've ever seen him — completely unmanageable at home
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and escalating, worse over the last day
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps getting worse on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: there's a strong musty, mousy smell on his breath and skin, and his eczema has flared up badly
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: he's had behaviour problems before when he's been off his special diet, but never shaking like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: his judgement is all over the place and he's behaving erratically; we can't keep him safe or calm at home

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a metabolic condition he was born with (PKU) that means he has to stay on a strict low-protein diet and drink a special medical formula
past_medical_history.how_managed: strict low-protein diet plus a prescribed amino acid medical formula supplement
supported at home and at school

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: phenylalanine-free amino acid medical formula (his special metabolic drink)

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: he's been refusing his special formula for about two weeks and eating a lot of normal high-protein food and fast food
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: 16-year-old living with his parents, who are present and making the call; they are exhausted and worried

paediatric_context.developmental_concerns: known intellectual disability related to his lifelong metabolic condition; parents provide most of the history

objective_data_offered.value: both hands shaking continuously, even when resting; he is pacing the room and cannot sit still
a strong musty or mousy smell on his breath and skin, noticeable across the room
very fair skin, blonde hair and blue eyes
a red, itchy, scaly rash on the inside of his arms and behind his knees, scratched raw in places
empty fast-food wrappers visible in his bedroom
